articles.title: Heavy gunfire in Somali capital as row over election delay escalates
articles.excerpt: The opposition has called for protests after the president's term in office was extended by a year.
articles.content: Government forces and opposition fighters have exchanged heavy gunfire in Somalia's capital, Mogadishu, as a row over delays to elections has escalated.
